**Weekly check-in #2 (week of 2026-05-16)** — read the LFS bandwidth meter at https://github.com/settings/billing → Git LFS Data. If you cross 500 MB cumulative this period, post a yellow-flag comment using the template in the runbook. If your billing reset day falls between this reading and the previous one, report bandwidth for both sides separately (see runbook → "Reset-day caveat").

Run `scripts/lfs-bandwidth-snapshot.sh` for templates. _Posted automatically by `.github/workflows/lfs-bandwidth-cron.yml`._
